name: Team Hick
subject: The stakes are high, but we can do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- We're asking every member of our team to step up and make a critical contribution to John's campaign for Senate this week, but before we do, there's a few things we think you should know:
* Every major political forecaster has rated this Senate race as a toss-up, proving that our campaign is one of Democrats' best chances to take a Senate seat from the Republicans in 2020;

* Republicans are taking this race seriously, with President Trump pledging this week that he'll campaign "a lot" for our GOP opponent, Cory Gardner;

* The majority of our contributions come from grassroots supporters giving whatever they can to support our team, which sends a message we're building this campaign the right way.

The stakes of this election are incredibly high, but we're building a strong, well-organized campaign that can win. And we need your help to keep doing just that as we approach our FEC fundraising deadline this month. **Can you rush a contribution of $10 or more to John Hickenlooper 's campaign for Senate today? We're facing the most important FEC deadline we've faced so far, and your contribution of any amount could be the difference between falling short or hitting our goal:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191216-mm?refcode=em-191216-mm2-a&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Team Franken
subject: ICYMI: Articles of Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
The high standards of leadership that once defined the United States are eroding and Iowans deserve a senator who'll raise the bar of public discourse while holding those in power accountable.
|
---

| | OK, team -- Mike sent an important message about the impeachment process last week, and you need to see it. The short version: The high standards of leadership that once defined the United States are eroding and Iowans deserve a senator who'll raise the bar of public discourse while holding those in power accountable. **That leader is Mike Franken.** [**Read his note, and chip in to his campaign, and help us restore Washington 's honor and reputation.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95cb/2930715893/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_L1&amount=15") Thank you, Team Franken \--------Forwarded message--------
From: Mike Franken
Subject: articles of impeachment
Date: Saturday, December 14, 2019 [](secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_H1&amount=15) Friends: This week the House of Representatives issued articles of impeachment against the President. The reputation of our nation and the rule of law are too important not to proceed with this unfortunate situation. I want to believe that this is not about President Trump, but more exactly the abuse of elected office. The facts appear clear -- the President asked a foreign leader for a personal favor and then acted to cover up the ask. This is illegal on two counts. The question now becomes whether this is grounds for removal from office. Political leaders, like leaders in the military, must often take the unpleasant path of standing alone, being out-front in upholding standards; and it's about honesty. **I 'm ready to be that leader for Iowa and hold our country and its leaders -- executive, military, judicial, or congressional -- to the highest standard. But I need your help to become the next Senator for our great state. [Can you chip in $15 to help us win? ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95c4/2930715893/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_L2&amount=15")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95c5/2930715893/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_btn1&amount=15")
---
I'm going to Washington to make sure our country and its leaders act lawfully for the good of Iowans and every American.
**But I can 't do it alone. It takes a team of proud, moral citizens to stand up and create change.** **[Click here and join our team with a quick donation.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95c6/2930715893/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articles_L3&amount=15")**
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
[**$10**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95c7/2930715893/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true") | **[$25](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95c0/2930715893/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true")** | **[$50](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95c1/2930715893/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true")**
---|---|---
**[$100](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95c2/2930715893/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_abx4&amount=100&express_lane=true")** | **[$250](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95c3/2930715893/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_abx5&amount=250&express_lane=true")** | **[Other](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95dc/2930715893/VEsHBQ/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_abx6&amount=15&express_lane=true")**
Thank you,
Mike Franken USN VADM (ret.)
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Iowa

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2432/33365068/4a62c2e5/3f8b95dd/2930715893/VEsHBA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/articles_dec?refcode=FRA_20191216_em_fr_all_articleskick_ftr&amount=15")
---

|
---

| | Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

| | Okay team, here's the rundown. The best thing we can do to support Jeff is to make sure that we show strength by the end of the year. One critical benchmark? The number of grassroots donations. **As of midnight last night, Jeff had 9,894 grassroots donations since October 1. Our goal?****_To make it to 10,000 before the end of the year._** [**will you chip in $3 to help Jeff meet this critical goal?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c462/6cd27893/52bc1fe5/1587a992/2353114733/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-12-16-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Taking back the Senate goes right through Oregon: unless Jeff wins here, there's no hope of sending Mitch McConnell and the Republicans packing. So let's lock this down. Let's show Jeff we have his back. name: Yang2020.com
subject: Did you enter yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Contribute any amount by MIDNIGHT tonight!

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4867%2E377263%2E6J3TkM) Yang Gang --

It’s not every day you get an invite to watch the premiere of _Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker_ with Andrew Yang -- but it’s here, and you only have a few hours left to enter.

[Any contribution between now and 11:59 PM ET tonight gets you in the drawing. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20050?t=8&akid=4867%2E377263%2E6J3TkM) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20050?t=16&akid=4867%2E377263%2E6J3TkM)
---
Good luck!

Yang2020

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Yang
Date: Mon, Dec 16, 2019 at 11:38 AM
Subject: Want to watch Star Wars with Andrew after the debate?

Yang Gang --

Ever wanted to meet Andrew? Ever wondered what Andrew was thinking right after a debate? Here’s your chance!

Andrew will be watching _Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker_ with one lucky winner and their friend on Thursday, December 19, right after the Los Angeles debate. (Plus, the flight and hotel stay is on us!)

Chip in any amount now and be automatically entered for a chance to join Andrew in Los Angeles. [But you have to enter by TONIGHT at 11:59 PM ET. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20050?t=15&akid=4867%2E377263%2E6J3TkM)
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20050?t=14&akid=4867%2E377263%2E6J3TkM)
---
Here’s what you could win:

* Roundtrip airfare for you and a friend to Los Angeles, CA.
* One night hotel stay in Los Angeles.
* _Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker_ screening with Andrew right after the debate.
* Fun stories to write home about.

The debate is just around the corner, so hurry and enter by tonight. Chip in any amount below and be automatically entered for a chance to watch _Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker_ with Andrew.
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20050?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4867%2E377263%2E6J3TkM)

Andrew can’t wait to meet you!

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20054?t=2&akid=4867%2E377263%2E6J3TkM)

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8bf/3eb3e2fc/691e9555/744ef788/3356729889/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8bf/3eb3e2fc/691e9555/744ef7f7/3356729889/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). name: MSNBC News Update via Bennet for America
subject: "All these mugs are stealing my ideas!"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Joe Biden said that Mayor Pete "stole his healthcare plan."

[This morning on MSNBC, Michael made it clear that he wrote the damn public option bill that both of these mugs claim to be their own:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba93d/134673f2/92392b5/69978e16/3880327502/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba93d/134673f2/92392b5/69978e16/3880327502/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Michael isn't a celebrity politician, and many people didn't know him when he announced -- but he's been creating and fighting for a public option for almost a decade!

Michael didn't need a poll or a presidential campaign to figure out what he believes in. He's been leading this fight for 10 years, and is the best candidate to move us forward into a new generation of leadership to start making progress for the American people.

[Some pundits may have called this campaign a long shot, but now people are paying attention. subject: We need 580 donations from Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Can I count on your help, friend? Hey friend, This morning we launched our end-of-year goal -- $800,000 before the clock strikes midnight on December 31st. **My team crunched the numbers, and if 580 people from Pennsylvania chip in from email, we 'll meet this goal in no time. Will you help us get there?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191216_CB_20191216-fr-CB-EM3-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

name: Laura, DGA
subject: Here's the honest truth about 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team -
Here's the hard truth: The 2020 election will be the biggest fight we've faced in years. Democrats have to stop President Trump and his GOP cronies - and we know Republicans will do anything to make sure we lose.
**Team, that means we need the best strategy to defeat them.**
As one of our top supporters, you know what it takes to win. We depend on your thoughts and opinions to help set our strategy because, even though politics is our job, we don't claim to know it all. The information our grassroots supporters provide gives us the ability to see the full picture.
**That 's why I'm reaching out today: [Please, if you can spare a few minutes, will you take our Election Year survey before midnight? Your responses will help us set our 2020 strategy and defeat Trump and his allies.](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY3MjU5NzMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTExOTk5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
Your input here is so critical: It's how we beat Donald Trump. It's how we organize, strategize and register every voter we can to defeat Republicans up and down the ballot.
Your response will help determine the outcome of the next election - and we're counting on you to help Democrats win across the country and stop Donald Trump's hateful agenda.
**But this survey is only open until December 16, 2019 at 11:59 P.M.** And right now, we're 259 short in FL of reaching statistical significance, so we're counting on your feedback to help elect Democrats and stop Trump.
_[**S**](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY3MjU5NzMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTExOTk5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)[o please, Team: Will you take our Election Year survey before midnight?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3MjU5NzMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTExOTk5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)_
| | [HELP DEMOCRATS WIN ›››](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY3MjU5NzMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTExOTk5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks for making sure we have the best grassroots strategy to stop President Trump. With you on our team, we know 2020 will be a great year for Democrats and for this country.

Laura Carlson
DGA Digital Director
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16725973&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MTExOTk5MQS2&spReportId=MTc4MTExOTk5MQS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---

name: Maya Rupert
subject: igniting the Obama Coalition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | To beat Donald Trump next November, we need a candidate who can bring together a coalition of young voters, voters of color, and students -- the same coalition that Barack Obama inspired in 2008 and 2012. Secretary Castro is speaking to the issues that inspire these voters -- **he can reassemble that coalition and ignite it to defeat Donald Trump.** [We can't risk losing this election. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc940/3eb3e2fc/69245ed9/744ef66d/273542772/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+We+canrsquot+risk+losing+this+election+i&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all") If we can't capture the excitement of these voters, Democrats will lose. If Trump wins, America will lose. We need a nominee who can bring this coalition together. [Chip in now to help us expand the reach of our ads that explain exactly what this campaign is about: standing up for the marginalized, bringing everyone into the fold, and speaking the truth even when others won't. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc940/3eb3e2fc/69245ed9/744ef66c/273542772/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+now+to+help+us+expand+the+reach+&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all") Let's win this,
Maya Rupert
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc940/3eb3e2fc/69245ed9/744ef66b/273542772/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc940/3eb3e2fc/69245ed9/744ef66a/273542772/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc940/3eb3e2fc/69245ed9/744ef669/273542772/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc940/3eb3e2fc/69245ed9/744ef668/273542772/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc940/3eb3e2fc/69245ed9/744ef657/273542772/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc940/3eb3e2fc/69245ed9/744ef656/273542772/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191216_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Tina Smith
subject: I'm concerned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our FEC fundraising deadline is coming up in about two weeks, and my team just told me we're still behind on where we need to be. Can you help?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191216-chase?refcode=em191216-chase&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") I'll cut to the chase, folks. Our FEC fundraising deadline is coming up in about two weeks, and my team just told me we're still behind on where we need to be before the clock runs out on us.

**So, can I count on you to rush an urgent donation before it's too late? | | | | | | | Peter,

Coach sent you an important message the other day. He just asked me to follow up.

**With polls showing the race neck-and-neck, it 's all hands on deck to DEFEAT the establishment politicians like Jeff Sessions!**

The early response to our year-end fundraising drive has been strong. But we have a big goal, and we're just getting started. It's vital that we raise $89,280 before we close out December, to kick off 2020 ready to charge forward and WIN.

Please see Coach's message below, and _**[make your most generous possible year-end contribution right now to help](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9b2addd54799246cad73f99492e04a87bc73b9fcdaafb5833eff4f0c20539deb97cf3a273e7129ec4b08607f74598e1ab3 "make your most generous possible year-end contribution right now to help")**_[.](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9be9f86dc09692b4a3c4183beba2bd1d6430aa531c5918d089abe61330c4336b329740dd35a991cd0421d5131e2e01e88f "make your most generous possible year-end contribution right now to help.")

We don't have the insiders and GOP elites behind us... Coach is counting on 100 percent on Alabama conservatives like you. _**[Tap or click HERE to stand with Coach in this fight](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9b077ee14a0424d0cc06baf7dbcde423884e074a5b3129a5f2b6492d8a907d6a32e6045343a7a6b518938c4cb1f8f50136 "Tap or click HERE to stand with Coach in this fight")**_[.](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9ba8889e23b9025730273c936c6cd63a1eee7f22c385da441925990a94ce536cd3d4323ccb1de7bf78873a6653eb5014bc "Tap or click HERE to stand with Coach in this fight.")

Paul Shashy

| | | Friend, I'm fired up, and believe me... with less than 100 days to go, we're not letting up.

_This primary race is heating up, and I 'm counting on friends like YOU!_

Today, we're launching our end-of-year fundraising drive. My team has run the numbers. We need to raise $89,280 this month to kick off 2020 strong.

**_[Rush a $10, $25, $50, or $100 year-end contribution to help us reach this vital goal!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9bac1d69ed7c731491b2072c66989f16c1b7dbc8dbb70f8a8b445d8e1dcff09d9b32ec0d935fd2a9acf24e454a6007f221 "Rush a $10, $25, $50, or $100 year-end contribution to help us reach this vital goal!")_**

I'm running to take on liberal U.S. Senator Doug Jones in a crowded GOP field. Voters have a number of options. But the choice is clear.

ALL of my Republican opponents in the March 3 primary are establishment politicians. **The worst among them is Jeff Sessions, who FAILED President Trump and is now desperate to return to the D.C. swamp lifestyle he enjoyed for more than 20 years!**

I need your help to defeat these establishment career politicians, Friend. Like President Trump, I'm a conservative outsider fighting to save America... and I have the President's back 100 percent.

I know we can win the primary, and then defeat Doug Jones next November. But I can't do it without the sustaining support of grassroots conservatives like you.

_**[Please chip in today to show where YOU stand in this race](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9beb6b73c009d55e87cf1f4dac80ffacc64204ee4be7b3bbdcc9d227aa2c810257320f4ec98d6891b22c2700c149c55506 "Please chip in today to show where YOU stand in this race")**_.

\- Coach _**[Make a $10 Year-End Contribution>>](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9b484982883ad4b121e12177928130e3773fb5038d482e04908590ffa6b8d8846af55d24e8b0877b0c183696b3203081d6 "Make a $10 Year-End Contribution >>")**_ _**[Make a $25 Year-End Contribution>>](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9bcce0896587cef0d519fb26ca9d1abed9f42b3f5f89d168b131313817eba61db06863d84c4d2e9f4bdbfdcd8b41b88414 "Make a $25 Year-End Contribution >>")**_ **[Make a $50 Year-End Contribution>>](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9b569bec2c1297c46e5170b6d1274dd10895a54b4eae4b0188bc26632879fcf38b3a9a888302aaaaf7a53ae122e8e6a2d7 "Make a $50 Year-End Contribution >>")** _**[Make a $100 Year-End Contribution>>](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9b2e67aaf13e96e0a4178e3ae94fd1140dc573305123964c46d873b4c2ed1151307640b83c45fa8e530c0ec0eada45fc1f "Make a $100 Year-End Contribution >>")**_ _**[Contribute Another Amount>>](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=a5fdcb6029435a9b73f4bf3581bfed6473f719a9d77be2e9bf6267688f4e1971f5121adfb80ebdba8300671cca8ce4c7d3835fa3f6cda60c "Contribute Another Amount >>")**_

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 12/16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday! Last week was another busy week traveling the state! Last week, I was so glad to get back to Bradley, Polk, Williamson, Knox, Sevier, Hamblen, and Sullivan Counties. There's nothing like a full week, getting on the road, reconnecting with old supporters and meeting new ones. I am thankful for so many of y'all who came out and showed your support this week. Hope to see you out there soon! **Media: ** Last week I had the opportunity to sit down with Alan Keyes in Sevierville talking about my faith and my candidacy for US Senate. [Watch my interview on his YouTube channel here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdukidiy-uunkhiuw-y/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdukidiy-uunkhiuw-j/) I also had the opportunity to talk to the Cleveland Daily Banner about my bid for US Senate and my views on immigration. As your next US Senator, we need to crack-down on our illegal immigraiton crisis, and I will work with President Trump to get it done! Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdukidiy-uunkhiuw-t/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdukidiy-uunkhiuw-i/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdukidiy-uunkhiuw-d/)! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, [DrMannyforSenate.com.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdukidiy-uunkhiuw-h/) [As the holidays are upon us, don't forget to grab Christmas gifts, such as our awesome Dr. Manny gear for you or your loved ones! ](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdukidiy-uunkhiuw-k/) Looking forward to ending 2019 strong! See you out on the trail. Dr. Manny P.S. We don't have the machine backing us, but we do have you. Would you mind chipping in to our campaign right now to send this conservative outsider to Washington? [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdukidiy-uunkhiuw-u/) |

Peter, We have got a huge deadline coming up in just two weeks. This is the last reporting deadline that we have before election day and that makes this critically important. This is the last opportunity for us to post these numbers to show the press and politicos that we mean business.

We have a lot of competition from corporate influence in this election. But, we are not taking corporate PAC money or money from fossil fuel interests because we are on your side — the side of the people.

[**That makes it even more crucial to have your support. name: Impeachment Update (via algreen.org)
subject: Vote tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NSoKpS8koBcswQiKQ20Cupxk1jqG50a9OCgo5HeqsN4=/-4DbpdIMmU3Q5lkJa8Mvl19URV9cLySmdSYoMDYQBzo=)
---
Folks, **Tomorrow, the full House of Representatives will vote on the issue of impeaching President Donald Trump.** This is the culmination of years of hard work by activists, advocates, and our grassroots movement. What happens tomorrow will be remembered for generations to come. My colleagues in Congress and I have a duty under the Constitution and a responsibility to you to hold President Trump accountable for his crimes and corruption. We must stand up for our democratic values, and show the American people that we will not sit by and allow greed and hatred to take our country back in time. I support the articles of impeachment -- however, I regret that they do not include accountability for the President's virulent bigotry in policies. But know that as long as I have the honor of representing you in Congress, **I will continue to fight for justice for communities who have been harmed by the President 's stoking of intolerance and white supremacy.** **So team, thanks for all you 've done to move the needle on this issue. As always, I am proud, grateful, and humbled to stand with you.** In solidarity, \-- Congressman Al Green P.S. Throughout impeachment proceedings, I have been under constant attack by Republicans who are furious with me for my role in bringing impeachment to a vote -- and the attacks will only get worse when we impeach tomorrow. **[I need your help: Can you chip in a few dollars to help me fight back?](https://act.myngp.com/el/NSoKpS8koBcswQiKQ20Cupxk1jqG50a9OCgo5HeqsN4=/ljDBsFL26dYDLs0wGM10ZHeyQ2KvIT0Z5ogMbaxcVvw=?refcode=1217-impeach&amount=25&recurring=auto)** | Keep Al Green in Congress
P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States | Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress

body:
The ONLY Official First Family Christmas Card. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=857e0687ef237d0f4b51b5467b6c08b88c11c99c89e6ef970db52eadef94d02b9a6c29ed52a3693e28ff4a97ef2d08daa8da498b9f2540e8)
---

Friend,

We noticed you haven't signed the _**Official First Family Christmas Card**_ yet.

It's the most wonderful time of the year, and we know the First Family would be excited to get a personalized note from one of their best supporters, like YOU.

President Trump and Melania loved reading all the kind messages written in the Christmas Card last year, and this year they've asked if they'd be receiving a message from Friend.

We've set a HUGE goal this year of getting _**2 MILLION AMERICANS**_ from all over the country to sign their **_Official Christmas Card,_** and we know you don't want to disappoint them.

**[Please sign the Official First Family Christmas Card TODAY and leave a personalized note for them to read.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=857e0687ef237d0f9c2d996d9cbc6c4b2b85e4a77de603f2e443d89b29d8e9642062d42df20f959242b5d9ad3fd7001391a54a456fb93907)**

A personal message from Patriots like YOU really means a lot to President Trump and his family. Here are a few of their favorites from last year:
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=857e0687ef237d0f76ec3f22c4a400ddc5153afd4f88d6a29295371108fd2296656620b8436c7d507d8794f15fa40387322ffdeb5879bcb9)
Remember, this is the **ONLY Official Christmas Card for the First Family.** We're giving it to them on December 25th so make sure you sign it before December 24th at 11:59 PM.

**[Please add your name and a personalized note to the ONLY Official First Family Christmas Card before December 24th at 11:59 PM to wish them a Merry Christmas.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=857e0687ef237d0fe9b2be7b4634b0dae8bf6f239da4f07ca7d90d42fd43ca2d68be6c8e71b1639ef56d350e851719ccf1a9ca04984a7e90)**

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020
[SIGN THE CARD NOW >>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=857e0687ef237d0f2a65ed5447b4219ed9f99a23de8be0626f519eb64ce7c34e59e983f08b27dd28c088f5b06afe3325ae7acfa3137746a3)

As natural disasters like Harvey, the wildfires in California, and flooding along the Mississippi ravage our country the Trump administration continues to ignore the simple truth - **we have a climate crisis at hand and something needs to be done NOW.**
Rather than taking action to fight potentially the greatest crisis of our lifetime, Trump has decided to pull out of the Paris Climate Accord. This is an act of willful ignorance - period. name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: I'm fired up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
I won’t stand for it, friend.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12962826/133997718/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.17_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWRjY2QxNC1mYzIwLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGGNo5A0oipjeTVlXrfZz_DFTFg0PmKB63fDLsJVLWA=) Hey friend,

**Yesterday, my team shared with you that the right-wing special interest group Club for Growth is ramping up its efforts to influence this race and, let me tell you:_I’m fired up about it._**

I’m running for Congress because I believe our government should work for hard-working people, not special interest groups. It’s why I’ve made it my priority as Auditor General to address real issues that are impacting people across the state of Pennsylvania -- and I intend to do the same thing in Congress.

**I don’t think anyone should be able to buy an election, but that’s exactly what these Republican dark money groups are attempting to do.**_I won’t stand for it, friend._ I am very proud of the grassroots campaign we’ve built here, and I have no doubt that we are going to win this race, but I’m going to need your help to do it.

[**We have a pretty big deadline coming up at the end of this month, and we still need to raise $1,668 by tonight in order to stay on target to meet our end-of-quarter goal. clean_body: I won’t stand for it, friend. = Hey friend, Yesterday, my team shared with you that the right-wing special interest group Club for Growth is ramping up its efforts to influence this race and, let me tell you:I’m fired up about it. I’m running for Congress because I believe our government should work for hard-working people, not special interest groups. It’s why I’ve made it my priority as Auditor General to address real issues that are impacting people across the state of Pennsylvania -- and I intend to do the same thing in Congress. I don’t think anyone should be able to buy an election, but that’s exactly what these Republican dark money groups are attempting to do.I won’t stand for it, friend. I am very proud of the grassroots campaign we’ve built here, and I have no doubt that we are going to win this race, but I’m going to need your help to do it. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for being a part of this fight with me, Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. Here's the good news: Since Elizabeth emailed you, we've seen an incredible turnout from our supporters working hard to get this campaign back on track for the end of the month.

**But here's the bad news: We're still slightly short of where we need to be to finish the year strong.**

With only a few weeks left before our next big fundraising deadline, any contribution you make now could have an incredible impact on the future of this movement.

**Our campaign is built brick-by-brick by grassroots donors and we're so close to reaching our goal of one million individual donors. So we're asking:**

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Sun, Dec 15, 2019
Subject: Look, I'll just be blunt:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy.

So I'm not hosting any fundraisers where you can only meet me if you can write a big check. And I'm not taking any money from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

You'll always know that I'm fighting for you -- not for any powerful special interest with deep pockets.

But our grassroots campaign is up against a big test. After the end of this month, we'll release a public report on how much we've raised in the past three months and how many people have chipped in to own a piece of our campaign.

**Look, I'll just be blunt: We need those fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible, and we're behind where we want to be to hit our fundraising goals.**

[**So I'm asking: Will you pitch in $2 or whatever you can today to help grow our campaign?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b30f/45c30650/110dc08c8/66fb35c1/1588323523/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY2Rl9FR1JfS0lDX1RfMjAxOTEyMTdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM66F_EGR_KIC_T_20191217_V1S3_P")

---
>
When I ran for office for the first time, not very long ago, I had a lot to learn.

But here was the first -- and most important -- lesson I got: Nobody does this on their own.

I'm grateful down to my toes for everyone who knocks on doors, makes phone calls, texts their friends about our new plans, hosts debate watch parties, and chips in $3 at a time. For everyone who makes this campaign their own. For everyone who's in this fight all the way.

If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies -- everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected.

We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in Pennsylvania and across the country.

[**That comes down to hitting this powerfully important mid-month goal before our next FEC fundraising deadline. Time's running short. If you can, please make a contribution today -- I'll be deeply grateful.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b30f/45c30650/110dc08c8/66fb35c1/1588323523/VEsDBw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY2Rl9FR1JfS0lDX1RfMjAxOTEyMTdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM66F_EGR_KIC_T_20191217_V1S3_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[ **DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b30f/45c30650/110dc08c8/66fb35c1/1588323523/VEsDBg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY2Rl9FR1JfS0lDX1RfMjAxOTEyMTdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM66F_EGR_KIC_T_20191217_V1S3_P")

But here's the bad news: We're still slightly short of where we need to be to finish the year strong. With only a few weeks left before our next big fundraising deadline, any contribution you make now could have an incredible impact on the future of this movement. Our campaign is built brick-by-brick by grassroots donors and we're so close to reaching our goal of one million individual donors. name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi=20Sloan?=
subject: Medicaid took Tawanda's house
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI SLOAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is the country we live in: Medicaid asset seizure leaves many families penniless, on top of dealing with the illness and death of loved ones. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c0080bd2a717/medicaid-took-tawandas-house?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=28ac127f5c&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | ,
What kind of government [seizes a grieving woman’s house](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=a75bdc856a&e=c169cb0a8e) to cover the costs of her mother’s long-term illness? **This is why we fight, and why we won’t stop until we have Medicare For All.**
---
| [ DONATE ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=af0fdc7321&e=c169cb0a8e " DONATE ")
---
| When we read [this](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=cfc672015c&e=c169cb0a8e), we were angry all over again about what our horrible healthcare system is doing to people’s lives. Tawanda lives in Massachusetts. After losing both her mother and husband to Alzheimers, **the state government is taking her house to pay for the five years her mother spent in a nursing home.**
---
|
---
_"Tawanda has refused to sell her house to pay her mother’s Medicaid debt. “From slavery years we never got our 40 acres and a mule; we never got reparations,” she said. “My parents made their 40 acres and a mule with blood, sweat, and tears, and now they want that too?””_
| We live in a country where people are forced to make impossible choices when it comes to healthcare and caring for relatives. It should not be this way.**Heidi will not stop fighting until we have Medicare For All that will cover any and all necessary healthcare costs and will be free at the point of service.** Together, we will end the needless suffering of our neighbors.
---
| [ DONATE ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=9063f19112&e=c169cb0a8e " DONATE ")
---
| Getting Heidi elected will help us build the movement for Medicare for All, but we know it’s just the first step. **Please help sustain our campaign that’s bringing thousands of working class people into this fight alongside us to win the just healthcare system we deserve.**

Thank you for all you do to grow this movement for the many, not the few.
In solidarity,

Team Heidi
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=79369d51ce&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=ae060b0551&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=4156a16cda&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=2e47ac04c6&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| [ DONATE ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=832ab67c32&e=c169cb0a8e " DONATE ")

| PAID FOR BY HEIDI SLOAN FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Sloan for Congress

name: Booker HQ
subject: We set a goal of raising $800,000 by the end of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Each time we've asked this team to rise up to a big challenge, you've come through. Friend, Each time we've asked this team to rise up to a big challenge, you've come through. It's because of people like you that we're still in this thing -- despite being an underdog up against literal billionaires. We're so thankful, but we know it's going to take a lot more to win. **That 's why the team set a goal of raising $800,000 by the end of the year.** If we do that, it'll be the best fundraising quarter of this campaign, and we can continue to invest in crucial early states like Iowa. **[Can you chip in right now to help make sure we can expand ads and grassroots operations in early states?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191217_BHQ_20191217-fr-BHQ-EM1-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** And hey, we promise you're not going to be seeing 40 Cory ads in a day like some of the other candidates in this race -- Cory doesn't have millions of dollars of his own money to throw at your TVs. But we know that if we can get our message out to more people, then more people will start showing up for this campaign. And that's how the comeback begins. **[So please, make a donation today and help us keep growing this effort.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191217_BHQ_20191217-fr-BHQ-EM1-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191217_BHQ_20191217-fr-BHQ-EM1-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cf5/5fca0d19/784fad95/291c95b0/1935194674/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cf5/5fca0d19/784fad95/291c95bf/1935194674/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cf5/5fca0d19/784fad95/291c95be/1935194674/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cf5/5fca0d19/784fad95/291c95bd/1935194674/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cf5/5fca0d19/784fad95/291c95b1/1935194674/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Here's the truth: If we don't raise $700,000 before January 16th, we won't be able to compete.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend,

[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f17/3188909986/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") I know you get fundraising asks from us all the time, but this is different.

When I spoke to my family about running for president, my daughter Caroline told me:

_" Dad, if you run and tell the truth, no one can fault you for it."_

So I'm going to tell you the honest truth:

[We need to raise $700,000 in 30 days or our campaign will not have the resources to compete in New Hampshire.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f17/3188909986/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f16/3188909986/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
It's no secret that I've been an underdog in this race.

So far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy. But without funds for TV and digital advertising, more field staff, and a direct mail program, [we cannot compete with the billionaires flooding the airwaves and building on the ground.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f17/3188909986/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I know that our path to victory runs through New Hampshire, where just 33% of Democratic voters say their minds are made up.

As other candidates have left the race or stumbled in the last few weeks, we have doubled down and gained momentum.

My team and I have put together an aggressive plan to reach the nearly 70% of undecided voters there through paid media--including digital advertising, direct mail, and TV--as well as expanding our organizing and outreach programs.

Core to this strategy are our 50 New Hampshire town halls and a new ad series to introduce our campaign to the many voters who are just tuning in to this race.

_But this is going to be expensive, and I can 't rely on a billionaire's bank account._

[The only way we can launch this program and compete in New Hampshire is by raising $700,000 before January 16th.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f15/3188909986/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**This is our final push and our final ask: We need your help to have more than just a fighting chance. Can you chip in $5 to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy to ensure our campaign has the funds we need by January 16?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f17/3188909986/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f14/3188909986/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f15/3188909986/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f16/3188909986/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f2b/3188909986/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f2a/3188909986/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=2000&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
If you're fully committed to my campaign, _thank you on behalf of the entire team._

[But if you haven't decided on a candidate yet and believe we need a president who's focused on the next generation - not just the next tweet -](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f17/3188909986/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") [then please consider stepping up today to help us reach this crucial $700,000 goal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f17/3188909986/VEsHBg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

At a time when other campaigns have slashed staff, closed offices, and left the race, we have been able to grow and build in New Hampshire. From more endorsements to larger crowds and new office space, the environment is ripe for our success.

[But without a significant uptick in fundraising, we will not have the resources to fully capitalize on the groundwork that has been laid to compete.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f17/3188909986/VEsHAQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[We will win this race by reaching out to the vast majority of undecided voters who are looking for a candidate who will beat Donald Trump and build opportunity for the next generation.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f15/3188909986/VEsHAA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**I 'm counting on this team to step up and fuel our campaign to victory. I know we can do it with your help. Will you chip in $5 (or whatever you can afford) right now to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f17/3188909986/VEsHAw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba934/134673f2/9260e57/69978f16/3188909986/VEsHAg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Thank you,

Michael

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Here's the truth: If we don't raise $700,000 before January 16th, we won't be able to compete.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend,

[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2d/3890364448/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") I know you get fundraising asks from us all the time, but this is different.

When I spoke to my family about running for president, my daughter Caroline told me:

_" Dad, if you run and tell the truth, no one can fault you for it."_

So I'm going to tell you the honest truth:

[We need to raise $700,000 in 30 days or our campaign will not have the resources to compete in New Hampshire.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2d/3890364448/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2c/3890364448/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
It's no secret that I've been an underdog in this race.

So far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy. But without funds for TV and digital advertising, more field staff, and a direct mail program, [we cannot compete with the billionaires flooding the airwaves and building on the ground.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2d/3890364448/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I know that our path to victory runs through New Hampshire, where just 33% of Democratic voters say their minds are made up.

As other candidates have left the race or stumbled in the last few weeks, we have doubled down and gained momentum.

My team and I have put together an aggressive plan to reach the nearly 70% of undecided voters there through paid media--including digital advertising, direct mail, and TV--as well as expanding our organizing and outreach programs.

Core to this strategy are our 50 New Hampshire town halls and a new ad series to introduce our campaign to the many voters who are just tuning in to this race.

_But this is going to be expensive, and I can 't rely on a billionaire's bank account._

[The only way we can launch this program and compete in New Hampshire is by raising $700,000 before January 16th.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f23/3890364448/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**This is our final push and our final ask: We need your help to have more than just a fighting chance. Can you chip in $5 to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy to ensure our campaign has the funds we need by January 16?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2d/3890364448/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2c/3890364448/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
If you're fully committed to my campaign, _thank you on behalf of the entire team._

[But if you haven't decided on a candidate yet and believe we need a president who's focused on the next generation - not just the next tweet -](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2d/3890364448/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") [then please consider stepping up today to help us reach this crucial $700,000 goal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2d/3890364448/VEsHBg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

At a time when other campaigns have slashed staff, closed offices, and left the race, we have been able to grow and build in New Hampshire. From more endorsements to larger crowds and new office space, the environment is ripe for our success.

[But without a significant uptick in fundraising, we will not have the resources to fully capitalize on the groundwork that has been laid to compete.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2d/3890364448/VEsHAQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[We will win this race by reaching out to the vast majority of undecided voters who are looking for a candidate who will beat Donald Trump and build opportunity for the next generation.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f23/3890364448/VEsHAA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**I 'm counting on this team to step up and fuel our campaign to victory. I know we can do it with your help. Will you chip in $5 (or whatever you can afford) right now to our New Hampshire Investment Strategy?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba935/134673f2/938fe9e/69978f2d/3890364448/VEsHAw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_121719_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

clean_body: | | | Friend, "" I know you get fundraising asks from us all the time, but this is different. When I spoke to my family about running for president, my daughter Caroline told me: " Dad, if you run and tell the truth, no one can fault you for it." So I'm going to tell you the honest truth: "" | | "" It's no secret that I've been an underdog in this race. So far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy. But without funds for TV and digital advertising, more field staff, and a direct mail program, "" I know that our path to victory runs through New Hampshire, where just 33% of Democratic voters say their minds are made up. As other candidates have left the race or stumbled in the last few weeks, we have doubled down and gained momentum. My team and I have put together an aggressive plan to reach the nearly 70% of undecided voters there through paid media--including digital advertising, direct mail, and TV--as well as expanding our organizing and outreach programs. Core to this strategy are our 50 New Hampshire town halls and a new ad series to introduce our campaign to the many voters who are just tuning in to this race. But this is going to be expensive, and I can 't rely on a billionaire's bank account. "" "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" If you're fully committed to my campaign, thank you on behalf of the entire team. "" "" At a time when other campaigns have slashed staff, closed offices, and left the race, we have been able to grow and build in New Hampshire. From more endorsements to larger crowds and new office space, the environment is ripe for our success. "" Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race. "" "" | | "" Thank you, Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: 234,000 voters could be purged in a critical swing state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, you read that right: up to 234,000 Wisconsin voters are about to be purged from the records, per the order of a county judge. After voting for Trump by less than 23,000 votes in 2016, Wisconsin swung blue for now Gov. Tony Evers in 2018 by 30,000 votes. Wisconsin will be critical in 2020, and this Republican-appointed judge's interpretation of a wildly gerrymandered Republican legislature's partisan law could cost us four more years of Trump. [**When Democrats Turn Out 's mission is to fight back against voter suppression tactics and get voters to the polls so we can ensure the future of our democracy and voting rights in America, but we can't do it alone. If you believe GOP voter suppression threatens the right to vote itself, we need you to stand with us today -- the 2020 election is in less than 11 months, so we need as many engaged Democrats to sign our pledge now to fight GOP voter suppression!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf71/6e9863e8/1721394e/1db0b161/2889103080/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/8vtRN191") Thank you for standing up for democracy. -WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf71/6e9863e8/1721394e/1db0b161/2889103080/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/8vtRN191")

subject: Trump is hurting Ohio families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:

| | The Trump Administration just announced a drastic change in SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program) requirements that would harm Ohio families: [45,000] people...will no longer have access to emergency nutrition. And they won't have access to health care. -- Loren Anthes, a public policy fellow for the Center for Community Solutions. This hurts families struggling to make ends meet, it hurts people down on their luck, laid off from a job and having trouble finding a new one, and this hurts children, none of whom should ever go hungry. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - The Trump Administration just announced a drastic change in SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program) requirements that would harm Ohio families: [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_december?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191217_SNAP_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191217_SNAP_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191217_SNAP_U2_X1") This hurts families struggling to make ends meet, it hurts people down on their luck, laid off from a job and having trouble finding a new one, and this hurts children, **none of whom should ever go hungry.** **The fact remains that Trump is out of touch with struggling families across the country** , and we can't afford to have people in office who will act as a rubber stamp to his cruel policies. He has voted multiple times to gut health care protections for low-income families, for people with pre-existing conditions, and children.
**In Ohio, Medicaid covers two out of every five children** \-- but Steve Chabot has recklessly voted to cut it more than once.
It's no wonder Chabot votes against our best interests -- **he 's taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from the insurance industry.**
Ohio can't afford two more years of Steve Chabot, we need someone who will put our interests above greedy insurance companies. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: A skinny kid with coke bottle glasses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- I'll try to keep this short. **Trump and McConnell are ripping away our health care, endangering our planet, and destroying our democracy.** Washington Republicans' policies are hurting real people. Costing people their jobs, making health care more expensive, and even separating families at the border. **Now, growing up as a skinny kid with coke bottle glasses and a funny last name, I 've dealt with my fair share of bullies.** I'm prepared to do it again and stand up to Donald Trump and take on Mitch McConnell in the Senate. But I cannot do it alone. [**Will you make a $10 donation before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year? This is the most important deadline we 've faced so far -- and your support has never been more appreciated by our team.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191217-mm?refcode=em-191217-mm3-b&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191217-mm?refcode=em-191217-mm3-b&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") This race represents one of our best chances to flip a Senate seat in 2020 -- and puts us one step closer to a government that works for the people instead of partisanship and special interests. When we win, we can finally work to advance policies that will have a lasting impact for all Americans on the issues that keep folks up at night, like retiring with dignity, health care, our economy, and more. Thanks in advance for all you do as part of our campaign. I appreciate having good folks like you on the team. -- John | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191217-mm?refcode=em-191217-mm3-b&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: DC Liberals Using Pompeo
body:
10 Reasons Pompeo Stays Put | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f23e9edaa69a/dc-liberals-using-pompeo?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
|
**_Washington effort to manipulate KS GOP silences Pompeo,
damages President Trump’s agenda_**
Dear Friend,
The Washington Republican establishment continues its push to oust Secretary of State Mike Pompeo from the Trump administration - **they want Secretary Pompeo anywhere other than helping President Trump** reassert America's leadership in the world.

_The 'Never Trumpers' still running the Washington Republican establishment stood by for decades as American jobs were shipped offshore, American tax dollars were shipped to America's enemies, and yet more tax dollars were flushed down the drain of patronage and special interests. ___

**_The elite are salivating to damage President Trump and to silence Secretary Pompeo on the international stage where he is an effective voice for America First. _**

**_Fortunately, Kansans see through the Washington scam_. As we travel the state, here are ten things real Kansans are telling us about the push to unseat Mike Pompeo from the Trump administration:**

1. _Leaving the office of Secretary of State would be Pompeo’s**third time in three years he left a job entrusted to him by Kansans** and the American people_ to climb the Washington ladder.

1. _Pompeo has**repeatedly denied** his interest in the Kansas U.S. Senate race_. Allowing himself to be duped into the race by the establishment puts his own credibility at risk.

1. _Kansans don’t want a two year**“interim” senator**_. Pompeo has made clear his presidential intentions for 2024, meaning that by 2022 his attention will be fully diverted away from Kansas.

1. _Kansans don’t want an** _appointed_ Democrat senator**_. If Gov. Kelly were to win re-election, and Pompeo the presidency, Kelly would appoint a Democrat as his successor.

1. _Leaving his current mission unfinished_ in **pursuit of personal political gain** would be unconscionable given the dangerous and chaotic world situation.

1. _Abandoning President Trump_ during an election year would send a message of **no confidence** in the president and his agenda.

1. _Abandoning the office of Secretary of State would**set back the Trump agenda** of America First_, handing off the office to a deep state “acting” secretary.

1. _Pompeo is the subject of numerous**frivolous Democrat lawsuits**_ for which he has federal legal counsel to fight back. If he leaves office, the legal costs may then be his to bear, whether personally or raising the funds from interested sources, which itself may raise conflicts.

1. _Pompeo would have to establish**residency**_ in Kansas before filing for senate. He would be _house hunting presumably while still purporting to serve as the US Secretary of State_.

1. _**Pompeo is far too valuable** in his current position toward advancing the interests of America_. It is in the best interests of Kansas, the nation, and the president for Pompeo to finish the mission he started.

_**The Washington establishment has lied to the American people for countless decades**_. **It’s time to tune out its propaganda and manipulation, and let Kansans get on with the business of vetting and electing their own U.S. Senator - and let Secretary Pompeo get back to the business of putting America First!** **__YOU__ make the choice for your next Kansas U.S. Senator**
_Add your voice to the growing roster of Kansans joining this effort_
_to keep our Kansas U.S. Senate seat working for Kansas – not Washington!_
---
| [ADD MY NAME ENDORSING DAVE FOR SENATE](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=a65f0d314b&e=41f8e27552 "ADD MY NAME ENDORSING DAVE FOR SENATE")

_**Thank you for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!**_ **Dave**

**Message from Gov. Kasich**

_I hope you and your family are having an enjoyable holiday season._

_The last few weeks have been busy and I want to share some brief updates with you below._

_Thank you for all that you're doing to help spread our message!_

_-John_
|
---
**Recent Comments**

Peter - Gov. Kasich has been offering commentary recently about not only the impeachment proceedings, but the long-term impacts this process will have on future presidents and members of Congress.

He has also been expressing concern about Americans living in their silos, unable to tell fact from fiction, and the eroding faith in journalism or even vital institutions like the F.B.I. and Justice Department.

[You can watch some clips from his interviews here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=0e17a2f62d8c4011b657f91d46a315e8&_e=zdMQNxOmsNIw7tAgO52Ncvm4mq6uIr7IeRbWhSM7jKB7q93TP7wELfyRzvmKF7t5E4q5mhVEkBujo-z0HR1DpiyEizeaLphYpua7OyxEYjyuoAZUH07Uo_aqta6P91rdr7Ef1-ZkMz-4Oej04WtaQ4iw6UlAnrjEiVfXGosETnB9kR3SpKjpqN6iQIpdeud5jIVVUJrvP9wzV8YwnmnjGXBrtsEAI2V8h8Ytde3Ne6N2qBpVV509Wb1jvHqafBjPXcN2miPwCj68gTbVzikagg%3D%3D).

**Portrait Unveiling**

Gov. Kasich's official portrait was unveiled last week in a ceremony at the Ohio Statehouse.

In all, Gov. Kasich served eight years as Ohio's governor (2011-2019), overseeing one of the great success stories in the state's history. With more than half a million new jobs created, balanced budgets, protections for our natural resources, support for small businesses - all while protecting our most vulnerable citizens - it was a record of great success.
