We have one final fundraising deadline to hit before the New Year. If you'd like to chip in to support Gov. Kasich's message and help meet our goal, . Thank you for all that you're doing! -Team Kasich | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Schumer’s Hail Mary Bid to Save Dems’ Disastrous Impeachment Drive
body:
"Senate Democratic leader Chuck Schumer knows his House colleagues bungled their ‘impeachment inquiry’ so badly that..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56e4b7bf72&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Schumer’s Hail Mary Bid to Save Dems’ Disastrous Impeachment Drive**

“Senate Democratic leader Chuck Schumer knows his House colleagues bungled their ‘impeachment inquiry’ so badly that they managed to shift public opinion markedly against removing the president. So he’s hoping for a do-over,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“In other words: do more fishing in hopes of getting something that might damage President Trump.” Here’s the problem: “Schumer is simply supposed to be part of the jury, along with the other 99 senators — and jurors don’t decide the witness list.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0463377111&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [“Support falls for Trump's impeachment, removal from office: CNN poll”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e49609d024&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “James Comey has finally admitted some ‘sloppiness’ over the surveillance warrant for former Trump campaign aide Carter Page.” But mere incompetence doesn’t seem to explain it. “Crossfire Hurricane was among the most politically fraught investigations in recent American history,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2bf56a496c&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “The stock market has been unstoppable under the influence of President Trump. The Dow Jones Industrial Average crossed 28,332.74 on Monday, meaning it has rallied 10,000 points, or more than 54 percent, since Trump’s election victory on November 8, 2016.” The S&P 500 is up more than 46 percent, Jonathan Garber writes in [_Fox Business_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c49da984d5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump’s United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) is finally up for a vote this week — just in time for Christmas.” After a long delay from House Democrats, the NAFTA replacement will mean more high-paying jobs and lower prices on many goods, Heritage Foundation President Kay Coles James writes in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c5a914c55&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1dfae5d00&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b97aec6bf&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8feaecd982)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Ed Markey
subject: Can I have a chance to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my re-election campaign. | |
---
| Friends -

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my re-election campaign. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request is so important -- especially today.

You see, our final end-of-quarter deadline for 2019 is coming up at the end of the month. This is an official FEC one. That means that afterward we'll have to publicly report our fundraising numbers.

Reporters and pundits look at these reports very closely. This time they're going to be looking even closer because this is the first full fundraising quarter since Joe Kennedy announced his campaign.

They're going to compare us head-to-head and try to make predictions about this race. They'll look at not just how much we raised, but also how many people chipped in.

That second point is really important. Now, I know that we have the largest movement of people in this race, but I need your help to demonstrate our grassroots strength to everyone.

So we need a large showing of support ahead of this deadline, which is why I need to ask:

**[Will you make a $3 donation to my campaign today to help us generate as many individual donations as possible before our December 31 deadline? Your contribution will send a powerful message about the depth of our grassroots support.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfc7/693b8b0a/43864724/72de7fff/2116825532/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTctYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191217-a")**

Having your support today would mean the world to me, so thank you in advance.

\- Ed **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfc7/693b8b0a/43864724/72de7fff/2116825532/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTctYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191217-a")**

---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---
Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: Sen. Cornyn's record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
When compared with MJ's lifetime of service, there's no question that MJ is better suited to fight for Texans in the Senate.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906da/7f51f7bc/4a7c9aef/4ef0d18f/2372191682/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Hey Peter -- When you compare Senator John Cornyn's record with MJ's lifetime of service, there's no question that MJ is better suited to fight for Texans in the Senate. Sen. Cornyn's record includes:
* Spending 17 years accomplishing nothing for Texans in Washington.
* Cowering to DC bosses like Mitch McConnell.
* Voting to rip access to health care away from millions of Texans.
* Selling Texans out to special interests, from Big Pharma to the gun lobby.

**[It's no wonder Senator Cornyn is vulnerable. We can beat him together -- pitch in to help MJ get it done!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906da/7f51f7bc/4a7c9aef/4ef0d18e/2372191682/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-grassrootscampaign?refcode=email_20191217.1nd__643__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

In contrast to Sen. Cornyn, MJ's entire life has been about fighting for what's right. She:
* Took on the Taliban when her rescue helicopter was shot down in Afghanistan.
* Faced down the Pentagon to open all military jobs to women.
* Is committed to providing _every_ Texan with access to affordable health care.
* Won't take corporate PAC money and is endorsed by End Citizens United for her commitment to ending the influence of money in politics.

MJ is the strongest candidate to take on Sen. Cornyn, but **early voting starts in just two months** , and we're running out of time! **Pitch in now to help us keep growing MJ 's grassroots campaign to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn:**

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: [Petition] Fire Stephen Miller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | | As impeachment news continues to consume the news cycle, let's make sure that Americans don't miss what's happening with Trump advisor Stephen Miller. **Already, over 38,000 people have signed our petition** demanding that he resign or be fired. [**Will you join us in signing the petition?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c464/6cd27893/52b15e56/1587aa11/3214580734/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.signherenow.org/petition/stephen-miller-resign/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-stephen-miller-resign-email-2") [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c464/6cd27893/52b15e56/1587aa0e/3214580734/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stephen-miller-resign/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-stephen-miller-resign-email-2") _Jeff_ Forwarded Message Have you heard of Stephen Miller? He is a top policy advisor to Donald Trump, first on the campaign and now in the White House. He was the architect of the **Muslim ban**. He pushed to **rescind the DACA ****program** for immigrants brought here by their parents. He reportedly convinced the president to **shut down the government** to try and force funding for a **border wall**. And perhaps worst of all, he helped create the **cruel family separation policy** that tears migrant children from their parents' arms and locks them in cages. **And now, no surprise, we have learned that he pressured conservative media to print racist conspiracy theories, and aggressively stoked white supremacist anger to help get Trump elected.** He has to go. We are building a movement to say with one loud voice: Stephen Miller has no place in the White House. [**Sign the petition. Stephen Miller must resign right now.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c464/6cd27893/52b15e56/1587aa0e/3214580734/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12970377/134077302/1547019419?refcode=em_fr2019.12.17_b1_ts_reactivate&recurring=auto&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzNkZjI3ZC0yMjIxLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L2dS6EWErcgXUuxoan_kn30T2kb1H7K3DXdYRjU99O4=) Team, It's been a busy week. **Yesterday,** Donald Trump Jr. [tweeted](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12970378/134077309/-1501680328?refcode=em_fr2019.12.17_b1_ts_reactivate&recurring=auto&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzNkZjI3ZC0yMjIxLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L2dS6EWErcgXUuxoan_kn30T2kb1H7K3DXdYRjU99O4=) about Elissa’s decision to stand true to her beliefs and vote for impeachment. **Today,** the [White House sent a press release](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12970380/134077311/853639153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzNkZjI3ZC0yMjIxLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L2dS6EWErcgXUuxoan_kn30T2kb1H7K3DXdYRjU99O4=&emci=db5b90be-1a21-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=573df27d-2221-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=9632289) specifically targeting Elissa. **Tomorrow** , President Trump and VP Pence will be in Michigan holding a rally. President Trump and his team are attacking Elissa with all they’ve got. They know that winning our swing district is a part of their path to winning Michigan. And the events of this week showed us how closely this race will be watched across the country. President Trump and his team are attacking Elissa for standing up for our Constitution and taking a principled approach to impeachment. [**Can you chip in and show President Trump that Elissa’s principled leadership deserves re-election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12970381/134077316/-1501680328?refcode=em_fr2019.12.17_b1_ts_reactivate&recurring=auto&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzNkZjI3ZC0yMjIxLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L2dS6EWErcgXUuxoan_kn30T2kb1H7K3DXdYRjU99O4=) | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12970382/134077318/-1501680328?refcode=em_fr2019.12.17_b1_ts_reactivate&recurring=auto&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzNkZjI3ZC0yMjIxLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L2dS6EWErcgXUuxoan_kn30T2kb1H7K3DXdYRjU99O4=)**

Americans deserve a leader who will unite our divided nation and turn big ideas into real solutions.

_That 's John._

We know that the reason you're with us in this fight is because John's a different kind of candidate. He's the kind of candidate you can believe in. The kind of candidate that has the experience it takes to accomplish the impactful change America so desperately needs right now.

**But our campaign needs your support.**

We can't afford to lose this upcoming election because of impossible promises, like "Medicare for All." We need an ambitious and pragmatic platform if we're going to defeat Trumpism at the ballot box once and for all.

**If you agree, pitch in $15 now to support real, meaningful change in 2020:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.16_e1_jkd_mmd_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=8+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.16_e1_jkd_mmd_all&source=em_fr_2019.12.16_e1_jkd_mmd_all")**

name: Mark Bergman, Senior Advisor
subject: The most progressive budget in Virginia history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
Help protect our majority.
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21ea/39260142/4259bf52/62639763/391411817/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- On January 8, session will convene with Democratic majorities in both the House of Delegates and Senate for the first time in 27 years. Today, Governor Northam announced the most progressive budget in Virginia history, which includes proposals to invest in K-12 education, address housing affordability, make tuition-free community college available to low- and middle-income students who pursue jobs in high-demand fields, protect Virginia's environment, transform the Commonwealth's early childhood education system, and combat maternal and infant mortality. This budget is fiscally responsible by protecting Virginia's AAA bond rating and puts millions in the reserve fund. A recent [**CNU poll**](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21ea/39260142/4259bf52/62639762/391411817/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/local/virginia-politics/virginians-mostly-welcome-democratic-takeover-cnu-survey-finds/2019/12/15/a9e909e0-1f90-11ea-a153-dce4b94e4249_story.html") found that a majority of Virginians support our Democratic agenda, but we need your help to make sure we protect our majorities and secure generations of progress for our Commonwealth. [**Please chip in $35 or whatever you 're able today to the Virginia Future Fund so that we can protect our majorities in 2021.**](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21ea/39260142/4259bf52/6263976d/391411817/VEsF/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa-futurefund") Thank you for standing with us, Mark Bergman

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from The Way Ahead email list, please [click here.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21ea/39260142/4259bf52/6263976c/391411817/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://act.ralphnortham.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 |

subject: Trump goes on a misogynistic, unhinged rant at campaign rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Peter, Last week, while the House drew up articles of impeachment condemning Trump's many abuses of power, the president was busy rallying his base and spewing hate to win a swing state. At a rally in Pennsylvania, he lied about the border wall, trashed the FBI for investigating him, said Sen. Elizabeth Warren had a "fresh mouth," and came close to encouraging violence against the Democrats in the House investigating him. It's obvious the destruction Trump is causing this country will not end as long as he is in office, so we are calling Trump to resign \-- for the good of our country, for the good of our democracy, and for the good of our future. We need 10,000 people to join us today, so if you agree with us, please add your name here: [**Demand Donald Trump resign >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf74/6e9863e8/17234960/1db0b15b/2244125582/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/RJR-i_PI") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. name: Gary
subject: Trump is heading to Michigan tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Trump knows if Democrats lose here, we have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaf8/5721a3ed/71bf9efb/efab51b/263364056/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend: Donald Trump will hold a campaign rally in Michigan tomorrow.
**Trump knows****if Democrats lose here, we have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate.**

That's why I'm asking for your help. Because if we lose here, Democrats will have two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington.

That means he and Donald Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, and you can bet they'll keep trying to dismantle protections for those with preexisting conditions.
Analysts at CBS News report Senate control is riding on what happens here in Michigan, but right now, polling shows me statistically tied with my opponent, and just last week, a dark money group launched ads attacking me.

**That's why we've set a goal to raise another $25,000 before Trump takes the stage tomorrow. Senate control is at stake, and every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing.**

**Please, friend, I'm counting on your immediate support:** **[Will you make a contribution of $3 right now- every dollar you can before midnight - to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk167-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team_Juli=C3=A1n?=
subject: FOX News poll: impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | A new FOX NEWS poll shows**support for impeachment and removal of President Trump at 50%** with Americans. [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc942/3eb3e2fc/69292600/744ef153/2715971868/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191217_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191217_em_fr_b1_castro_all") [Donate >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc942/3eb3e2fc/69292600/744ef152/2715971868/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Donate+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191217_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191217_em_fr_b1_castro_all") **Juli an was the first candidate in this race to call for impeachment.** Trump has repeatedly abused his power and has proven himself unfit to hold the Office of the President of the United States. If the Senate fails to convict Trump, we must be sure we're ready to fight hard and beat him in November. Julian has been leading the field in speaking out against the corruption and cruelty of this administration. **He is the candidate who can rebuild the coalition of voters that elected President Obama** and leads with the boldness and moral clarity it will take to defeat Trump. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Kendra Horn is voting to overturn the election
body:
Oklahomans didn’t vote for this | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3e2cbce10aba/calling-all-patriots-12096665?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=33a5e6bd2d&e=795c6d9796)
---
| Peter,

Kendra Horn just announced her decision to vote in favor of impeaching President Trump. This vote to overturn the 2016 election, less than a year before the 2020 election, is proof that her promise to be an independent voice for Oklahoma voters was nothing more than political hot air.

When Horn ran for Congress last year, she claimed to be different. She claimed to be a "moderate" voice in a conservative district. But now it's clear that she wasn't being honest with you -- this impeachment vote proves that she's no different from the rest in Washington. She's simply a pawn for Nancy Pelosi, AOC and the far-left radicals... she is part of the partisan problem in DC.

Horn has decided to put the political interests of the National Democrat Party and Nancy Pelosi ahead of the interests of the hard-working voters of the 5th District of Oklahoma. She has proven herself to be a partisan servant of Washington, NOT our district.

History will show this impeachment to be a far-left fantasy that suckered an entire party and tore our country apart—Kendra Horn is part of that problem. The failed Mueller witch hunt and the Inspector General Report both confirmed that the left wants to overturn the 2016 election and will go to any lengths to do it.

Simply put, this was a time for courage to stand against a partisan witch hunt and Kendra Horn failed us. She has to go. [**Will you please donate just $5 or more to help us fight to take back this district for conservatives and get the impeachment-first Democrats out of power?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5bad358136&e=795c6d9796)

We need every bit of help, however, so we can flip this district because the left will go to extreme ends to defend it. National Journal said this is the nation's [**#1 battleground district.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7a851bca7c&e=795c6d9796)

Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House from Pelosi and AOC in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=3384db47ec&e=795c6d9796)

**[Will you contribute just $5 or more to help us beat Kendra Horn and send a principled conservative to Congress?](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=11c7da60ae&e=795c6d9796)

She has failed the conservative voters of this district and has to go.**

subject: Impeachment War

body:
They HATE Democracy. |
---

---

Friend,

Tomorrow, this Impeachment Scam is finally going to a vote in the House.

By proceeding with an invalid impeachment, Democrats are violating their oaths of office, breaking their allegiance to the Constitution, and _**declaring open war on American Democracy.**_

There has been absolutely no due process. In fact, more due process was afforded to those accused in the Salem Witch trials. This is a DISGRACE.

I have been misquoted, mischaracterized, and fraudulently misrepresented during this Impeachment Scam.

**This entire scam has never been about me though. The truth is Democrats are unwilling to accept that YOU won and that YOU now hold the power.**
---
|
No President ever could have endured or passed this many witch hunts. The only reason I'm still standing is because I have the _POWER OF THE PEOPLE_ on my side, I have you.

Before the upcoming vote, I want to post another HUGE fundraising number to ensure that we have the resources to win this IMPEACHMENT WAR.

I'm calling on my **most FIERCE and LOYAL defenders** to step up. There has never been a more critical time to show where you stand. Remember, this is WAR and America's future depends on us winning.
**I want to raise $2,000,000 before tomorrow 's vote. This is so CRITICAL that I've activated an EMERGENCY DOUBLE-MATCH on ALL CONTRIBUTIONS.**

name: Tim Walz
subject: Co-sign my letter to the Trump administration
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, Minnesota has a strong moral tradition of welcoming all who seek refuge.‬ We have always stepped forward to offer those fleeing the most desperate circumstances a place to call home. It's who we are. In keeping with this proud tradition, I sent a letter to Secretary of State Mike Pompeo officially offering my consent to continue refugee resettlement in our state. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TIhJ40t4Vm-W4aTOWmPmZbr3fnWPfXeD-sRlILtEZKs=/LgjjqW8wHRM8ugAKUenFsxWRM8C2zcpVBWSF4bXbT9k=)
---
My friend,
‪Minnesota has a strong moral tradition of welcoming all who seek refuge.‬ We have always stepped forward to offer those fleeing the most desperate circumstances a place to call home. It's who we are.
In keeping with this proud tradition, I sent a letter to Secretary of State Mike Pompeo officially offering my consent to continue refugee resettlement in our state.
**‪This holiday season, join me and tell the Trump administration: The inn is not full in Minnesota.[Co-sign my letter today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/TIhJ40t4Vm-W4aTOWmPmZbr3fnWPfXeD-sRlILtEZKs=/LgjjqW8wHRM8ugAKUenFsxWRM8C2zcpVBWSF4bXbT9k=)**
**[SIGN NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/TIhJ40t4Vm-W4aTOWmPmZbr3fnWPfXeD-sRlILtEZKs=/LgjjqW8wHRM8ugAKUenFsxWRM8C2zcpVBWSF4bXbT9k=)**
Minnesota has always been a beacon of hope for those seeking shelter. Thank you for helping us keep it that way.
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz

body:
Hi -- this is HUGE.
**A brand new Change Research/Post and Courier poll shows that Democrats are within striking distance of ousting Lindsey Graham in South Carolina -- Democrat Jaime Harrison is down by just TWO points.**
If Democrats can win in South Carolina, we've got a great chance at winning back the Senate. But closing this two-point gap will be really, really hard. That's why we told Jaime we'd raise $10,000 before midnight to help him do it. Jaime can win, but taking on one of the GOP's most entrenched politicians means that hitting our $10,000 Rapid Response goal to swing the polls is absolutely critical.
[**Help from people like you is the only way Jaime can do this, and it 's the only way Democrats can take back the Senate majority. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: What They're Saying: Gov. Holcomb's Next Level Agenda
body:
People are talking about Governor Eric Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda, a bold plan focused on improving Hoosiers’ lives across Indiana. Read the.... |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **A Bolder, Brighter Future for Indiana**
---
| **People are talking about Governor Eric Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda -- a bold plan focused on improving Hoosiers’ lives across Indiana. Read the [full agenda here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=621044e986&e=1acd9bb3d6), and then see what people are saying:**
---
|
---
| _**Indiana House Speaker Brian Bosma:**_
“Governor Holcomb laid out a strong vision for the coming year and we look forward to working with him and our Senate colleagues to accomplish our shared goals. We agree with his prudent call to use the state’s reserves to pay cash for several capital projects, which will maximize long-term savings. We will also work together to hold teachers and schools harmless from this year’s ILEARN scores, and provide increased price transparency for health care consumers in addition to addressing surprise billing, among other issues.”

_**Indiana House Speaker-Elect Todd Huston:**_
“Governor Holcomb’s Next Level agenda highlights many of our shared legislative priorities, and we will work together to tackle the issues important to Hoosiers. From investing cash reserves in one-time capital projects with the potential to save the state more than $120 million in interest, to addressing rising health care costs, we have a busy session ahead. Legislators are preparing to hit the ground running, and I’m confident we will deliver on our goals and continue the state’s positive momentum.”

_**Senate President Pro Tem Rod Bray:**_
“Today the governor unveiled another agenda that provides great leadership and vision for the future of our state, and we look forward to working with Gov. Holcomb and our partners in the House of Representatives on legislative items to help move our state forward. One of the most important topics we will be collaborating on is addressing the cost of health care. We won’t solve this issue overnight, but creating more transparency for health care costs is critical as we work to make progress on this important issue that affects all Hoosiers, and we look forward to getting to work.”

_**Indiana Republican Party
Kyle Hupfer, Chairman:**_
“Governor Holcomb has been Putting People First since day one and his 2020 Next Level Agenda continues his commitment to strengthening our state. By focusing on strengthening our economy, infrastructure, workforce and education, and our public health, Governor Holcomb is showcasing the leadership and vision Hoosiers have come to expect from this administration and their governor.”

_**Indiana Chamber of Commerce**
**Kevin Brinegar, President & CEO:**_
“The Governor is focused on the policies that will have the greatest impact on Hoosiers and their employers. You can’t ask for more than that. We are encouraged by the forward-looking approaches Governor Holcomb has put forth to keep our economy strong and grow talent.”

_**Indiana State Police Alliance:**_
“Distracted Driving is a serious issue in Indiana and we’re proud to stand with Governor Holcomb to increase Hoosiers safety on the roads.”

_**Indiana Criminal Justice Institute:**_
“ICJI supports Governor Holcomb’s agenda, which includes calling for Indiana to become a hands-free device driving state. In 2018, roughly 10% of distracted driving crashes in IN resulted from cell phone use. This will make roads safer and save lives!”

_**March of Dimes Indiana:**_
“Today, large majorities of women are remaining in the workforce while pregnant and returning to work after having their babies. We are proud to stand with Governor Holcomb to seek reasonable accommodations for pregnant employees!”

_**Indiana Institute for Working Families
Jessica Fraser, Director:**_
“We are proud to stand with Governor Holcomb to seek reasonable accommodations for pregnant employees.”

_**Indiana Coalition Against Domestic Violence:**_
“Pregnant employees deserve reasonable accommodations in the workplace and we are happy Governor Holcomb has made this a priority on his Next Level Agenda.”

_**Indiana 211 Partnership, Inc.** :_
“We’re excited to enhance 211 services alongside Indiana FSSA to better connect Hoosiers to the local services they need.”

_**American Lung Association of Indiana:**_
“Thank you to Governor Holcomb for supporting and advocating for Tobacco 21, which is proven to reduce smoking rates and will have a tremendous impact on the youth e-cigarette epidemic happening in Indiana and across the country.”

_**American Heart Association: **
**Dr. William Gill, President, Board of Directors in Indianapolis:**_
“The American Heart Association applauds Gov. Holcomb for making the health of our youth a priority. Nearly 90 percent of smokers first try tobacco and become addicted by age 18. In addition, we’ve seen a 78 percent increase in the use of e-cigarettes among high school students in just one year, leading to addiction, health problems and a future filled with chronic disease. By raising the minimum sales age for all tobacco products, including e-cigarettes, cigars, and smokeless tobacco, we can reduce tobacco use, nicotine addiction, and tobacco-related disease and death. We look forward to working with Indiana lawmakers during this session to protect our kids from the burden of tobacco.”

_**Indiana Hospital Association
Brian Tabor, President:**_
“We applaud Governor Eric Holcomb’s leadership in putting forth a legislative agenda with a comprehensive approach to sound health care policy. From saving Hoosier lives, protecting consumers, and increasing transparency, his proposals put Indiana on a path to lower costs and better health outcomes...”

_**Trans-Care Ambulance**
**Russell Ferrell, CEO:**_
“This initiative by the governor is important to us and to fire departments that help communities, as it can reduce costs to ER expenses...We are glad to see the governor make this move.”

_**Crawfordsville Mayor Todd Barton:**_
“Governor Holcomb outlined his 2020 legislative agenda today, including plans to increase access to healthcare by encouraging more community paramedic programs that are focused on patient outcomes and highlights Crawfordsville as best practice model.”

_**Columbia City Mayor Ryan Daniel:**_
"One thing I have always appreciated about Governor Eric Holcomb is that he is constantly looking towards the future. As I look over his 2020 agenda, I'm really happy to see the continued investment of time, energy, and dollars into issues like mental health, education, trails, broadband, roadways, and other critical matters that are important to the future of the State and its communities. These matters are important to our City's growth and future."
---
|
---
| **What do you think about Governor Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda?

Share your thoughts on social media with the hashtag #NextLevelAgenda and #OneIndiana!**
---

We will also work together to hold teachers and schools harmless from this year’s ILEARN scores, and provide increased price transparency for health care consumers in addition to addressing surprise billing, among other issues.” Indiana House Speaker-Elect Todd Huston: “Governor Holcomb’s Next Level agenda highlights many of our shared legislative priorities, and we will work together to tackle the issues important to Hoosiers. From investing cash reserves in one-time capital projects with the potential to save the state more than $120 million in interest, to addressing rising health care costs, we have a busy session ahead. Legislators are preparing to hit the ground running, and I’m confident we will deliver on our goals and continue the state’s positive momentum.” Senate President Pro Tem Rod Bray: “Today the governor unveiled another agenda that provides great leadership and vision for the future of our state, and we look forward to working with Gov. | | Stephen Miller is a white supremacist. Period. Recently, the Southern Poverty Law Center released a cache of email from Miller to extremist website _Breitbart_ , dating from 2015 (when he was an aide to Sen. Jeff Sessions) until well into the 2016 campaign. **Those emails reveal Miller funneling toxic white supremacist propaganda, debunked conspiracies, and racist rants to _Breitbart_ editors, who cheerfully broadcast them to the world.** [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639090f/55b66746/2d0ced4e/80f01c4/3869331219/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stephen-miller-resign/kennedy/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-stephen-miller-resign-email") **[Sign the petition demanding Stephen Miller's immediate resignation.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639090f/55b66746/2d0ced4e/80f01c4/3869331219/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stephen-miller-resign/kennedy/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-stephen-miller-resign-email")** Now a White House Senior Advisor, Miller mines the shameful eras of American history to resurrect our nation's most hateful, hurtful, morally bankrupt ideas. He spins racism into Trump policy, including the bigoted Muslim ban and willfully cruel family separation plans. He spews repugnant "white genocide" conspiracies. He writes talking points defending the Confederacy. **Stephen Miller is ideological dead weight, dragging our country down as we try to live up to our better angels**. **His continued influence in this administration is a disgrace**. He's got to go. _Now_. **[Add your name to call on Stephen Miller to resign, effective immediately.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639090f/55b66746/2d0ced4e/80f01c4/3869331219/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/stephen-miller-resign/kennedy/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-12-stephen-miller-resign-email")** _Team Kennedy_ Every day, Joe is fighting for the fundamental right to health care, for climate justice, for worker dignity, and to ensure ironclad civil rights. name: Yang2020
subject: Join us in Iowa in January
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We need all hands on deck during the month.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4872%2E377263%2ELjb3SP) Hey Yang Gang --

We just finished an incredibly successful bus tour through Iowa, qualified for the December debate -- AND hit our $2 million fundraising goal.

Andrew and the Yang Gang made it to 14 events in just five days, crisscrossing the state and meeting veterans, moms, union members, and high schoolers. And we raised enough to make it all happen in a little more than a week.

The success of this tour demonstrates our commitment to compete in the state of Iowa and to lay the groundwork for a January surge.

But we'll need all hands on deck in January. We are asking our best supporters around the country to join us in Iowa during the month.

We have tons of work to do: Knocking on doors, having face-to-face conversations, and talking to Iowa caucus-goers about why Andrew should be their first choice.

[Please sign up if you are interested in coming to Iowa for any amount of time in January. We will have an Iowa staff member follow up with you about details and accommodations. ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-iowa-volunteers-20191217?source=email-20191217mid-ia&t=2&akid=4872%2E377263%2ELjb3SP) | [Sign Up](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-iowa-volunteers-20191217?source=email-20191217mid-ia&t=3&akid=4872%2E377263%2ELjb3SP)
---
**OR**

[If you can’t sign up, can you pitch in $10 or more to help us fund housing, organizers, and literature so everyone who comes to volunteer has the resources they need to be successful? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20056?t=4&akid=4872%2E377263%2ELjb3SP)

We look forward to seeing as many of the Yang Gang as possible in Iowa!

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20056?t=5&akid=4872%2E377263%2ELjb3SP)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=6&akid=4872%2E377263%2ELjb3SP) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=4872%2E377263%2ELjb3SP) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: On the 8th day...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | | of 12 Days of Tom
---
---
Friend: Over two years ago, Tom started a petition calling for Trump’s impeachment — because he knows that organizing works. In just two weeks, he’d gathered over one million signatures, then two million in the next week. And the momentum didn’t stop — **Tom united over 8 million Americans demanding action!** Supporters made thousands of calls to Congress about impeachment, helped flip the House in 2018, and tirelessly kept up the call until it finally happened. Tom listened and worked with the people because he believes in doing what’s right, not what’s convenient.
---
| [Wear your support for impeachment](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBhrQ0JPsb60hh7E5EVel38woylVUTkSqB9gJ4On0EHhMIq4ZqQBMyR9x2Ppdlu7HHZygo22H3-2FGE867kbGFgKWOlCLh-2FbJ2CfOwcZWPyL7kFTtmJ0ny-2FwHywhhQOXsm4-2FSygP8no423XXrPKC0FcojvEbSUWQbisNQCGG-2B6npFr71htGxsUSI-2BQ2AK3KaerAaslqpuhISyuMOBHEHNbjU0UeKlXTgezbouPbVNjuLN0Q_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFchdtgGiD6Ukhzp3XLBdGePChQdjCL-2F2yvs9K-2BFTyb8sbr7Jfk9FQ2cfvYd4foRZDNJzEBTm2lZy69SsS8snd8Cs4PC8D0s4IaOJhe1J79TqkcIYBrVLsoL5GuGtawfu7tzYlB5LrujNeyMXVKmbwYdlKa580hu-2FiBXaOcI2iqAwpnJm4Ls5dolSMGzgMmLPOEcVwn-2FuWRcCg1VnQNbDPebnu9NYjCog-2B7gumo1-2FkThxT2YhxK9x6Jv2iN9DepZbxwEwvYX9tKocTdaGphZZw8ghcSbjOTvyG158xLhfnyaMeiCtgWj5vHxkzxKKaxMVhKTQshEP8JllJtvK7PDTm7wqC78CoKriaps-2BQbuGeyRhA-3D-3D)
---
Tom realized that the resistance to Trump’s presidency was igniting and uniting Americans across the country. It was about more than just his removal from office — people felt that they had been left behind, and the Washington insiders in our government weren’t listening. In households all around America, there has been a sense of widespread frustration at a broken system that allowed someone like Donald Trump into the White House in the first place. That’s what Tom’s running for president to fix. clean_body: | | | | of 12 Days of Tom Friend: Over two years ago, Tom started a petition calling for Trump’s impeachment — because he knows that organizing works. In just two weeks, he’d gathered over one million signatures, then two million in the next week. And the momentum didn’t stop — Tom united over 8 million Americans demanding action! Supporters made thousands of calls to Congress about impeachment, helped flip the House in 2018, and tirelessly kept up the call until it finally happened. Tom listened and worked with the people because he believes in doing what’s right, not what’s convenient. | Tom realized that the resistance to Trump’s presidency was igniting and uniting Americans across the country. It was about more than just his removal from office — people felt that they had been left behind, and the Washington insiders in our government weren’t listening. In households all around America, there has been a sense of widespread frustration at a broken system that allowed someone like Donald Trump into the White House in the first place. That’s what Tom’s running for president to fix. This is a major moment in our history. Thanks for all you do. -Tom 2020 This is part of our 12 Days of Tom email series — a way to look at the past, present, and future of this campaign! It’s also to celebrate the holidays and have a little fun in the process. | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! _**CAMPAIGN UPDATE**_
---
| [JOIN THE TEAM](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=111ed7787c&e=a212bb87cc "JOIN THE TEAM")
---
| It's been a busy week on the campaign trail....
But, keeping this seat on the Land Board and lowering prescription drug costs for Montana families is worth the hard-work.
---
| | Troy's Quote of the Week:
"The Land Board is vital to funding K-12 education while supporting the backbone of our economy."
---
|
---
|
---
| Troy started out the day in Billings attending a Yellowstone County Commissioners meeting followed by a discussion with the Sheriff about Ag policy. Troy then met with Mayor Bill Cole to discuss issues affecting Billings residents and public safety.
---
|
---
| Thank you Yellowstone County Republican Women for another great Christmas Luncheon.
---
|
---
| It's not a trip to Billings without a cup of coffee at Rock Creek Roasters.
---
|
---
| Thank you Montana Stockgrowers for a great event. Ag leaders understand the importance of keeping a proven conservative on this Land Board seat.
---
|
---
|
---
| The Wirth Family and Rocking Z Guest Ranch put on a great meet and greet.
---
|
---
| Joe, Al, and Troy stopped in to talk with Aaron Flint during the Montana Stockgrowers conference
---
|
---
| Very honored to catch up with Jim Steinbeisser, VP of the Stockgrowers.

| | From immigration to police violence, to discussing the lack of diversity in the Iowa caucuses and New Hampshire primaries, Secretary Castro is speaking hard truths others won't, and addressing issues others are afraid to touch. **In an era when Trump is hell-bent on lying and deceiving the American people, Secretary Castro is the sole candidate willing to tell the truth on important issues. ** He has put forward plans to overhaul our immigration, criminal justice, housing, education, and foster care systems, among many others. He isn't looking to make small changes or put a bandaid on any one issue, but rather seeing our challenges holistically and with intersectionality. **Let 's make it clear how badly he's needed in this race. ** [We are working to reach our end-of-year fundraising goal, but we need your help to meet our daily goal. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc943/3eb3e2fc/692ef4c8/744ef04c/502617494/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191217_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191217_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc943/3eb3e2fc/692ef4c8/744ef04b/502617494/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191217_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191217_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc943/3eb3e2fc/692ef4c8/744ef04a/502617494/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191217_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191217_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

In an era when Trump is hell-bent on lying and deceiving the American people, Secretary Castro is the sole candidate willing to tell the truth on important issues. He has put forward plans to overhaul our immigration, criminal justice, housing, education, and foster care systems, among many others. He isn't looking to make small changes or put a bandaid on any one issue, but rather seeing our challenges holistically and with intersectionality. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Donald Trump wants to take SNAP benefits from millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, The Trump administration announced rule changes to the SNAP program, formerly known as food stamps, that would tighten work requirements for receiving benefits \-- kicking almost 700,000 people off of much-needed benefits. This latest move, combined with two other proposed rule changes yet to be finalized, would force a total of 3.7 million Americans off of SNAP. If this doesn't show the inhumanity and heartlessness of the current government, we don't know what does. Telling families in need that they are on their own and that the government no longer supports them is cruel, demeaning, and harmful while saving the government only pennies. [**We need engaged Democrats to stand with us today in calling on the Trump administration to reverse its decision and keep American families on SNAP today. We need at least 5,000 signatures today to send a strong message that we do not approve of this inhumanity and cruelty.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf72/6e9863e8/175c8a7d/1db0b158/923846925/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap/?code=WDTO&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fs.surveyplanet.com%2Fw2MckZvD") Thank you for supporting working families today. The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf72/6e9863e8/175c8a7d/1db0b158/923846925/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap/?code=WDTO&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fs.surveyplanet.com%2Fw2MckZvD")

Derek,

Just last week at a campaign rally, President Trump renewed his commitment to winning Virginia. **He clearly hopes to defeat Mark in the process,** and we need to work hard to make sure that doesn't happen.

With the President's poll numbers tanking in states Trump won in 2016, national Republicans are dead serious about making Virginia a top battleground in 2020. Here's what we know:

Donald Trump has set up his re-election headquarters in Virginia. The Trump Victory Initiative has held campaign events in every part of the Commonwealth and right before the 2019 elections, President Trump sent Vice President Pence to the Commonwealth to campaign with Virginia Republicans.

**That's what Mark and Virginia Democrats are up against. We need to report strong numbers to show Donald Trump and Mike Pence we're ready to fight back. Will you chip in today to help Mark build the campaign we're going to need to win in 2020?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

That's what Mark and Virginia Democrats are up against. We need to report strong numbers to show Donald Trump and Mike Pence we're ready to fight back. Will you chip in today to help Mark build the campaign we're going to need to win in 2020? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Team Warner "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Team Tina
subject: Trump won't let Minnesota slip through his fingers again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We missed our grassroots fundraising goal yesterday. A problem like this could be enough to give Trump and the GOP the boost they need in Minnesota.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191217-missed1?refcode=em191217-missed1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Folks, we spent all day crunching the numbers for our mid-month fundraising deadline and bad news: **we missed the goal** -- not by a lot, but enough to make a difference in our re-election battle.

Here's why that matters: Minnesota is a must-win state for Democrats to take back the Senate majority. But we're a top target for Donald Trump and his cronies, especially after he lost the state by just 1.5 points in 2016.

**Trump will do whatever it takes to make sure Minnesota doesn't slip through his fingers again.**

But with our last FEC deadline of the year quickly approaching, any slip up now could give Trump the advantage he so desperately wants, so we're asking you to step up today:

**Can Tina count on you to rush a donation of $10 or more to help us catch up on yesterday's missed goal? Every single donation makes a huge difference in our work to keep Minnesota from turning red.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191217-missed1?refcode=em191217-missed1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

After the December 31 FEC deadline, our quarterly fundraising numbers will become available to the public.

Reporters, pundits, and Republican operatives will use these numbers to judge the strength of our campaign.

**This public fundraising report will be used as a measure of our movement's strength. That's why we have a plan to make sure we have the strongest fundraising report possible.

We've crunched the numbers, and we need 257 supporters from Pennsylvania to step up today to stay on track to reach our goal of 1,000,000 unique grassroots donors.**

We know this is a big goal, but our movement has helped crush all our goals until this point. We believe that with your help, we can reach this goal, too.

**[We wouldn't be asking if this weren't important. Will still need 257 more donors from Pennsylvania to chip in today to get us back on track. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Dear Madam Speaker
body:
President Donald J. Trump sent a letter about Democrats’ partisan impeachment crusade to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi this afternoon.

https://www.whitehouse.gov/1600daily/
The White House • December 17, 2019

** Dear Madam Speaker
------------------------------------------------------------
President Donald J. Trump sent a letter to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi today, exposing Democrats’ partisan impeachment crusade for the unprecedented, unconstitutional sham that it is.

A few important excerpts from the President’s letter:
* “The Articles of Impeachment introduced by the House Judiciary Committee are not recognizable under any standard of Constitutional theory, interpretation, or jurisprudence. They include no crimes, no misdemeanors, and no offenses whatsoever.”

* “Speaker Pelosi, you admitted just last week at a public forum that your party’s impeachment effort has been going on for ‘two and a half years,’ long before you ever heard about a phone call with Ukraine.”

* “Before the Impeachment Hoax, it was the Russian Witch Hunt.”

* “You are the ones interfering in America’s elections. You are the ones subverting America’s Democracy. You are the ones Obstructing Justice. You are the ones bringing pain and suffering to our Republic for your own selfish personal, political, and partisan gain.”

* “You and your party are desperate to distract from America’s extraordinary economy, incredible jobs boom, record stock market, soaring confidence, and flourishing citizens. Your party simply cannot compete with our record.”

* “Our Founders feared the tribalization of partisan politics, and you are bringing their worst fears to life.”

Read the full letter from President Trump. (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/letter-president-donald-j-trump-speaker-house-representatives/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

SHARE: Democrats’ unprecedented and unconstitutional abuse of power (https://www.facebook.com/WhiteHouse/posts/2673970012690715?__xts__%5b0%5d=68.ARATdRN8tC8-7wKksGNBSwwiUsDMXnaSUjflKT81P_zhmW8uDhq5bDjPRE0EAsHzuYmGTYWUil9ztCZal_SrMuY_rnFRevME1cc1E_-t3Uw4ce3iTr-Nl2DYXKiskI0fBeKYgZlCArRwur35671n4i00dXh0BYHjEAHqe4ilNkhNQrcw6IlcyXS5P4JS-I6O0ZrWUUAIpxq_H79N-6Y8SA2n-aZTpEgeh80wBq0COMuaywxdQqi5QIeQlWrhh2kfikU6frPbLSymEmknNcK1P3r0hHDxoa_S0k0DahzGcJeG-dyXXUHzuWVMkFguU3FNKiGktZDvoFg3rnmohOvHVuUl&__tn__=-R)

** President Trump’s next big move to help American students
------------------------------------------------------------
In the United States, every student should have the chance to earn a high-quality education, regardless of background. This week, President Trump is signing a bill that will make that promise closer to reality than ever before.

The FUTURE Act, which stands for Fostering Undergraduate Talent by Unlocking Resources for Education, accomplishes two major objectives. First, it permanently reauthorizes funding for Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs), as well as other minority-serving institutions to the tune of $255 million. Second, it will simplify the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) and the loan repayment process for all, significantly reducing the paperwork burden placed on borrowers.

President Trump has made fighting for struggling, historically forgotten communities (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-ensuring-forgotten-americans-forgotten-no/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) a hallmark of his Administration. Support for HBCUs has been a key piece of that agenda. Barely a month after taking office, he signed an executive order to move the Federal HBCU initiative back within White House purview. This September, he spoke (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/remarks-president-trump-2019-national-historically-black-colleges-universities-week-conference/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) at the 2019 National Historically Black Colleges and Universities Week Conference.

“Every day of my presidency, we’ll strive to give every child, of every background and every race, religion, color, and creed, the best chance to reach that beautiful American Dream,” he said. “We will never let you down, and we will never stop fighting for you.”

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
House Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Democrat Congressional leadership as they ponder how little they’ve done for the American people | October 16, 2019

Privacy Policy (https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | Contact the White House (https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact/) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1a054da933)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc944/3eb3e2fc/6933cb48/744ef3a4/2076566232/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191217_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191217_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc944/3eb3e2fc/6933cb48/744ef3a3/2076566232/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191217_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191217_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc944/3eb3e2fc/6933cb48/744ef3a2/2076566232/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191217_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191217_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Team Wendy
subject: No Peloton required for this gift.
body:
We want you in on this holiday fun!
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ab6/704929dc/167a4454/3993ee1e/3389504524/VEsH/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.wendydavisforcongress.com/")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ab6/704929dc/167a4454/3993ee1e/3389504524/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.wendydavisforcongress.com/")
Friend,
When it comes to Chip Roy's campaign coffers, special interests and big corporate donors are the gift that keeps on giving.
**But with the holidays almost here, Wendy had a gift idea in mind we think would be _even better_ for Chip.** **[Watch Wendy's video to find out what it is. >>](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-hustlewd?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk44-fr-nd")**
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-hustlewd?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk44-fr-nd")
What Chip is doing in Washington has Wendy fired up: She's ready to take him on in one of the most competitive congressional races in the country - and flip this seat from red to blue. But just because this race is tough doesn't mean we can't have a little fun.
Friend, we want _you_ in on the holiday fun, too: **[Click here to watch Wendy's video now - you won't want to miss this!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-hustlewd?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk44-fr-nd")**
Team Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ab6/704929dc/167a4454/3993ee10/3389504524/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ab6/704929dc/167a4454/3993ee13/3389504524/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ab6/704929dc/167a4454/3993ee12/3389504524/VEsO/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
